requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — 230V / 50Hz, Type C / Type J (Swiss-style) Plug Environment
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——230V / 50Hz，C型 / J型（瑞士标准）插头环境
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——230V / 50Hz，C型 / J型（瑞士標準）插頭環境

summary.en: Rwanda's mains supply is 230V / 50Hz. Rwanda uses Type C (two-round-pin Europlug) and Type J (three-round-pin Swiss-standard) plugs and sockets. Type J is uncommon in Africa and makes Rwanda distinctive: the Type J socket accepts Type C plugs but not Type A, B, or G plugs. Electrical safety requirements for plugged devices are assessed under RBS RS standards based on IEC 62368-1 (or legacy IEC 60950-1 for older product families) for audio/video, IT, and communications equipment. Devices with mains connections must be rated for 230V / 50Hz operation and carry applicable RBS-recognised safety documentation. Adapters and chargers with Type A (China standard) plugs cannot be used directly and require a compatible plug configuration for Rwanda sockets.
summary.zh: 卢旺达市电供应为230V / 50Hz。卢旺达使用C型（双圆形插销欧洲插头）和J型（三圆形插销瑞士标准）插头及插座。J型插头在非洲极为罕见，是卢旺达的独特之处：J型插座可接受C型插头，但不接受A型、B型或G型插头。插电设备的电气安全要求依据RBS基于IEC 62368-1（或音频/视频、IT及通信设备旧产品族的传统IEC 60950-1）的RS标准进行评估。带有市电连接的设备须额定适用于230V / 50Hz运行，并持有RBS认可的适用安全文件。配备A型（中国标准）插头的适配器和充电器不能直接在卢旺达插座上使用，须采用兼容的插头配置。
summary.zht: 盧旺達市電供應為230V / 50Hz。盧旺達使用C型（雙圓形插銷歐洲插頭）和J型（三圓形插銷瑞士標準）插頭及插座。J型插頭在非洲極為罕見，是盧旺達的獨特之處：J型插座可接受C型插頭，但不接受A型、B型或G型插頭。插電設備的電氣安全要求依據RBS基於IEC 62368-1（或音頻/視頻、IT及通訊設備舊產品族的傳統IEC 60950-1）的RS標準進行評估。帶有市電連接的設備須額定適用於230V / 50Hz運行，並持有RBS認可的適用安全文件。配備A型（中國標準）插頭的適配器和充電器不能直接在盧旺達插座上使用，須採用兼容的插頭配置。

standards_or_laws: RBS RS standards based on IEC 62368-1 — Audio/video, IT and communications equipment safety (Rwanda)
RBS RS standards based on IEC 60950-1 — IT equipment safety (legacy, Rwanda)
RURA Type Approval Regulations — electrical safety documentation requirement (Rwanda)

summary.en: GB 4943.1 (IT equipment safety, equivalent to IEC 60950-1) and GB 62368.1 (AV/IT/communications equipment safety, equivalent to IEC 62368-1) apply in China at 220V / 50Hz with Type A (two-flat-pin) plugs. CCC certification covers electrical safety for applicable product categories. Chinese devices rated 220V may be compatible with Rwanda's 230V supply in practice but the nominal mains voltage and plug type differ. GB safety test reports at 220V are not automatically accepted by RBS; IEC-based reports may be reusable subject to RURA/RBS review.
summary.zh: GB 4943.1（IT设备安全，等效IEC 60950-1）及GB 62368.1（音频/视频/IT/通信设备安全，等效IEC 62368-1）在中国以220V / 50Hz及A型（双扁形插销）插头环境适用。CCC认证涵盖适用产品类别的电气安全。额定220V的中国设备在实际使用中可能与卢旺达的230V供电兼容，但标称市电电压及插头类型有所不同。220V环境下的GB安全测试报告不被RBS自动接受；基于IEC的报告可能在经RURA/RBS审查后得以复用。
summary.zht: GB 4943.1（IT設備安全，等效IEC 60950-1）及GB 62368.1（音頻/視頻/IT/通訊設備安全，等效IEC 62368-1）在中國以220V / 50Hz及A型（雙扁形插銷）插頭環境適用。CCC認證涵蓋適用產品類別的電氣安全。額定220V的中國設備在實際使用中可能與盧旺達的230V供電兼容，但標稱市電電壓及插頭類型有所不同。220V環境下的GB安全測試報告不被RBS自動接受；基於IEC的報告可能在經RURA/RBS審查後得以復用。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 — Safety of IT equipment (equivalent to IEC 60950-1, China)
GB 62368.1 — AV/IT/communications equipment safety (equivalent to IEC 62368-1, China)
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — electrical safety for applicable product categories (China)

gap.en: Rwanda's 230V / 50Hz supply with Type C / Type J (Swiss-style) sockets requires plug configuration incompatible with China's standard Type A plug. Devices must be rated for 230V / 50Hz. Electrical safety documentation under RBS RS / IEC 62368-1 (or IEC 60950-1) is required for the RURA type approval dossier. Chinese GB safety reports at 220V / Type A plug are not automatically accepted. Type J sockets do not accept Type A (Chinese), Type B (US), or Type G (British) plugs — products must ship with a compatible Type C or Type J plug for Rwanda.
gap.zh: 卢旺达230V / 50Hz供电及C型/J型（瑞士标准）插座要求与中国标准A型插头不兼容的插头配置。设备须额定适用于230V / 50Hz。RURA型式批准档案须提供基于RBS RS / IEC 62368-1（或IEC 60950-1）的电气安全文件。220V / A型插头的中国GB安全报告不被自动接受。J型插座不接受A型（中国标准）、B型（美国标准）或G型（英国标准）插头——产品须随附兼容的C型或J型插头出售于卢旺达。
gap.zht: 盧旺達230V / 50Hz供電及C型/J型（瑞士標準）插座要求與中國標準A型插頭不兼容的插頭配置。設備須額定適用於230V / 50Hz。RURA型式批准檔案須提供基於RBS RS / IEC 62368-1（或IEC 60950-1）的電氣安全文件。220V / A型插頭的中國GB安全報告不被自動接受。J型插座不接受A型（中國標準）、B型（美國標準）或G型（英國標準）插頭——產品須隨附兼容的C型或J型插頭出售於盧旺達。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety compliance against RBS RS / IEC 62368-1 (or IEC 60950-1) at 230V / 50Hz is required as part of the RURA type approval technical file. Rwanda uses Type C and Type J (Swiss-standard) sockets — Type J does not accept the Chinese Type A plug, and products must ship with a compatible plug. Chinese GB safety reports at 220V / Type A configuration are not automatically recognised by RBS or RURA. Verify current applicable RS safety standards and plug/socket requirements with RBS before submitting the type approval dossier.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 须在230V / 50Hz条件下依据RBS RS / IEC 62368-1（或IEC 60950-1）进行电气安全合规，作为RURA型式批准技术档案的一部分。卢旺达使用C型和J型（瑞士标准）插座——J型插座不接受中国A型插头，产品须随附兼容插头。220V / A型配置下的中国GB安全报告不被RBS或RURA自动认可。提交型式批准档案前，请与RBS核实当前适用的RS安全标准及插头/插座要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 須在230V / 50Hz條件下依據RBS RS / IEC 62368-1（或IEC 60950-1）進行電氣安全合規，作為RURA型式批准技術檔案的一部分。盧旺達使用C型和J型（瑞士標準）插座——J型插座不接受中國A型插頭，產品須隨附兼容插頭。220V / A型配置下的中國GB安全報告不被RBS或RURA自動認可。提交型式批准檔案前，請與RBS核實當前適用的RS安全標準及插頭/插座要求。
